name: Creamy Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 4 Cups Potatoes, Cut Into 1-inch Cubes (about 4 medium)
2 Slices turkey bacon, cooked and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat potatoes, shallots, broth and garlic to boiling in a Dutch oven.
2. Reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer about 12 minutes or until the potatoes are very tender.
3. Cool slightly.
4. Place half of the potato mixture in a blender. Cover and blend about 15 seconds or until smooth.
5. Stir the blended mixture back into the potato mixture in the Dutch oven.
6. Stir in milk, 1/4 teaspoon pepper, the clams, and bacon.
7. Heat over medium heat, stirring frequently, until hot.
8. Sprinkle with chives. Serve with cracked fresh pepper.
(Makes 6 servings)
